_comment: Auto-extracted tool descriptions. Edit these to improve function calling.

acknowledgeHoliday.description: To get holiday acknowledgment. DO NOT announce.
acknowledgeHoliday._original: EXECUTE SILENTLY to get holiday acknowledgment. DO NOT announce

addHabit._original: Mark a habit as done for today
